name: sports_car
description: Low-poly sports car with cabin, bonnet, spoiler and four wheels
script:
import bpy, math

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')

def box(name, sx, sy, sz, loc, parent=None):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=loc)
    o = bpy.context.active_object
    o.name = name
    o.scale = (sx, sy, sz)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)
    if parent: o.parent = parent
    return o

# Body
body = box('Car_Body', 1.90, 0.90, 0.40, (0, 0, 0.40))

# Cabin — tapered top
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(0, 0.05, 0.70))
cabin = bpy.context.active_object
cabin.name = 'Car_Cabin'
cabin.scale = (1.10, 0.70, 0.32)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)
cabin.parent = body
# Shear cabin slightly to taper rear
for v in cabin.data.vertices:
    if v.co.y < 0:  # rear verts
        v.co.x *= 0.75

# Bonnet slope
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=(-0.52, 0, 0.22))
bonnet = bpy.context.active_object
bonnet.name = 'Car_Bonnet'
bonnet.scale = (0.85, 0.82, 0.10)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)
bonnet.parent = body

# Spoiler
spoiler_mount = box('Car_SpoilerMount', 0.05, 0.08, 0.18, (0.82, 0, 0.58), body)
box('Car_SpoilerWing', 0.90, 0.14, 0.04, (0.82, 0, 0.70), spoiler_mount)

# Wheels (torus)
for wx,wy in ((-0.80,-0.48),(0.80,-0.48),(-0.80,0.48),(0.80,0.48)):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_torus_add(
        major_radius=0.30, minor_radius=0.09,
        location=(wx, wy, 0.30), rotation=(math.pi/2,0,0))
    w = bpy.context.active_object
    w.name = f'Car_Wheel_{wx:.2f}_{wy:.2f}'
    # Hubcap disc
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(
        radius=0.18, depth=0.06,
        location=(wx, wy+(0.06 if wy>0 else -0.06), 0.30),
        rotation=(math.pi/2,0,0))
    hub = bpy.context.active_object
    hub.name = f'Car_Hub_{wx:.2f}'

# --- Materials ---
# Body: gloss red
red = bpy.data.materials.new('CarRed')
red.use_nodes = True
bsdf = red.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF']
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.85,0.05,0.05,1)
bsdf.inputs['Metallic'].default_value=0.15
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value=0.10
bsdf.inputs['Coat Weight'].default_value=1.0

# Rubber: tires
rubber = bpy.data.materials.new('CarRubber')
rubber.use_nodes = True
rubber.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.05,0.05,0.05,1)
rubber.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Roughness'].default_value=0.95

# Chrome: hubcaps
chrome = bpy.data.materials.new('CarChrome')
chrome.use_nodes = True
chrome.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.85,0.85,0.85,1)
chrome.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Metallic'].default_value=1.0
chrome.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Roughness'].default_value=0.08

for o in bpy.data.objects:
    if not o.data or not hasattr(o.data,'materials'): continue
    o.data.materials.clear()
    if 'Wheel' in o.name: o.data.materials.append(rubber)
    elif 'Hub'   in o.name: o.data.materials.append(chrome)
    elif 'Car_'  in o.name: o.data.materials.append(red)

body.name = 'SportsCar'
print('SCRIPT_DONE: SportsCar created')
